name: Marco Antonio
comment: The way you centered that clay was so satisfying to watch!

responses.name: Clara Ruiz
responses.comment: Totally! It looks much easier than it actually is.

name: Lucía Méndez
comment: What type of clay are you using for this vase? The texture looks incredible.

name: Kevin Smith
comment: I keep struggling with the walls collapsing when I go higher. Any advice?

responses.name: Pottery Master
responses.comment: Try to keep your hands more steady and use less water as you go up!

name: Beatriz Soler
comment: The glazing process in this video is pure art. I love the blue tones.

name: Mateo Rossi
comment: I just started my first pottery class today because of your channel!

responses.name: Beatriz Soler
responses.comment: That's awesome! It's a very relaxing hobby.

responses.name: Mateo Rossi
responses.comment: It really is! A bit messy but worth it haha.

name: Sandra V.
comment: Can't wait to see how these pieces look after the final firing!
